rationale: Turn 1 immediately fires the anti-spiral brake, reframing the request as repeated local patching across touchpoints rather than a missing entrance-page note. It allows only a temporary emergency notice while explicitly preventing baseline lift and setting a structural consolidation deadline. Turn 2 keeps that contract under launch pressure: it permits the one-off temporary copy, states it is not a long-term entrance baseline, and preserves a 2026-07-12 structural review/consolidation deadline.
